subject: ri_policy_router
summary: The weak pre-aged release seam at 2023-12-22 15:00 is reachable and can be blocked by a bounded continuation-local guard.
mechanism: At the target seam, baseline remains NONE/COOLDOWN_ACTIVE while the candidate becomes RESEARCH_POLICY_ROUTER_NO_TRADE, proving the seam is reachable and locally controllable.
do_not_repeat: Do not claim seam A is unreachable or untestable.
Do not reopen seam discovery for 2023-12-22 15:00 without citing this reachability result.
next_admissible_step: Any future seam-A candidate should start from confirmed reachability and focus on avoiding broader churn rather than re-proving the target row exists.
